w:r.w:t: Diagnostic Impression and Initial Intake Assessment
Reason for Seeking Residential Treatment or Substance Use Rehab:
Substance Use Disorders: (Last Use: Onset/Start: Quantity: Frequency: Duration: Route:)
(Heroin, Hydrocodone, Oxycodone, Morphine, Hydromorphone, Codeine, Meperidine, Fentanyl) DENIES
(Methamphetamine: crystal meth, crank, speed, tweak, glass, etc.)DENIES
Sedative, Hypnotic, or Anxiolytic Use Disorder:
(Benzodiazepines: Xanax, Ativan, Valium, Klonopin, Barbiturates, Z-drugs) DENIES
Previous Attempts at Less Restrictive Levels of Care: Denies
Thoughts of Self-Harm or Harm to Others in the Last 90 Days:
Longest Period of Sobriety and Maintenance:
FlexCare Housing or sober living or going home
FlexCare Application, TLP, CLP, HOME INC
Family History of Mental Illness or Substance Abuse:
Family History of Medical or Neurologic Illness:

THE CLIENT DENIES ACTIVE SUICIDAL AND HOMICIDAL IDEATIONS AT THIS TIME AND DENIES ANY PLAN, MEANS, OR INTENT DURING ADMISSION. THE CLIENT HAS NO ACCESS TO WEAPONS. THE PATIENT AGREES TO REMAIN SAFE IN THE FACILITY AND NOT TO ENDANGER ANYONE'S LIFE AT THE FACILITY.

Maintain sobriety for 90 days, recognize mental health condition signs, understand medications, develop life skills, engage in counseling and medical appointments, pass drug and alcohol screenings, and participate in cultural and religious activities without conflicts.
Dr. Marshall Umoren DNP, PMHNP-BC; Dr. Cholleta Menja DNP, PMHNP-BC; SMI Team; Family (if allowed), Advocate, legal guardian.
Literacy: “Yes I can read and write”
